The following events took place in '''190 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Births==
*[[Vima-Da-Boda]]<ref name="EGTC">''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' states that Vima-Da-Boda is 200 years old in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. Although this year is not stated outright in the source material, simple mathematics arrives at a birth date of 190 BBY.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-10-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' {{Imo}}
